remarks: Wonderful opportunity to live in a spacious one-bedroom condo that lives like a private home. Enjoy your own front-door entrance, generously sized rooms, and an eat-in kitchen with sliders opening to a private deck-perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The home offers in-unit laundry, abundant closet space, and additional basement/crawl space for storage. Light-filled and inviting, the residence has an open, airy feel throughout. Set within a well-maintained complex with low common charges, this property combines comfort, convenience, and value. Move right in and enjoy effortless living. **This property is subject to Probate Court Approval.**
